seoTitle: Kellidie Bay vs Kelly — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest

ogTitle: Kellidie Bay vs Kelly: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Kellidie Bay and Kelly.
heading: Kellidie Bay vs Kelly — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kellidie Bay, South Australia and Kelly, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kellidie Bay has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Kelly (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kellidie Bay or Kelly safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kellidie Bay has a flood risk score of 30/100, while Kelly scores 56/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kellidie Bay scores 47/100 for bushfire risk. Kelly scores 31/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kellidie Bay or Kelly?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kellidie Bay has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.82% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
